rule_metadata.author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Drop Binaries Into Spool Drivers Color Folder

rules.rule_text:
title: Drop Binaries Into Spool Drivers Color Folder
id: ce7066a6-508a-42d3-995b-2952c65dc2ce
status: test
description: Detects the creation of suspcious binary files inside the "\windows\system32\spool\drivers\color\"
  as seen in the blog referenced below
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/07/27/untangling-knotweed-european-private-sector-offensive-actor-using-0-day-exploits/
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-07-28
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|startswith: C:\Windows\System32\spool\drivers\color\
    TargetFilename|endswith:
    - .dll
    - .exe
    - .sys
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
